_comment: Koda configuration. Copy this to ~/.koda/config.json and fill in your values. See README.md for field descriptions.

social._comment: Your social handles. Any field you don't use, set to empty string or remove.

gsc._comment: Google Search Console sites you want analytics for. Empty array if none.

discord._comment: Set mention_only to true if Koda should only respond to @mentions in channels.
